steps.title: Combine like terms directly
steps.content: All terms have the same variable part $x^6$, so add/subtract coefficients directly: $$ 7 + 9 - 8 $$

steps.title: Simplify the expression
steps.content: Calculate the arithmetic: $ 7 + 9 = 16 $, then $ 16 - 8 = 8 $. The simplified form is $ 8x^6 $. The answer is 8.
